description_long: This is a slice of cake with two visible layers of light beige sponge separated by a thin layer of white filling. The cake is topped with a smooth, white icing that covers the top and sides, giving it a clean and polished appearance. A single, realistic-looking red strawberry with a green leafy top sits on the upper surface as a decorative accent. The cake's edges are slightly rounded, and the overall shape is a classic wedge, typical of a single serving. The surface of the icing appears smooth and slightly glossy, while the interior sponge looks soft and airy. There are no additional decorations or embellishments besides the strawberry.
description: A wedge-shaped slice of cake with white icing, two beige sponge layers, and a single red strawberry on top.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the two sponge layers, white icing, and the strawberry on top.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the pointed tip of the cake and the strawberry centered above.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the cake's side layers and the strawberry from a different angle.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the flat rear surface of the cake and the leafy top of the strawberry.
